Canal des Deux Mers · 1–23 August

Bordeaux to the Mediterranean, by bike

A relaxed camping tour along the canal — six places to linger in, flat shaded riding, and a train option for the hot or lazy days. Tap any stop to open it.

23days
10stops
6deep dives
~520km of canal
0real hills
Campsite stop Hotel hub (big city) — Atlantic on the left, Mediterranean on the right —

Tap a circle on the map, a card below, or use ← → keys to open each stop

The timeline

Heat & shade. Ride 7–8am to ~11am, then a long lunch, siesta and pool noon–4pm. The Homps→Béziers stretch (around Le Somail / Béziers) has lost its shade trees to disease — ride it earliest and carry extra water.

Campsites are the default; hotels appear only at the three big cosmopolitan hubs — Bordeaux, Toulouse and Montpellier — where city campsites are far out and you need room to build or box the bikes. Distances kept to ~16–28 mi (~25–45 km) to match a relaxed 20–30 mile day. August is peak season — book popular sites ahead; 15 Aug is a national holiday. Town photos are embedded in the page (they work offline). The food/pride photos still load live from Wikimedia/Wikipedia (Creative Commons); if one can't load, that section hides. Check current campsite opening before you go.
